heading: Today
text: Periods of morning sun north giving way to clouds.  Mostly cloudy south, with a chance of showers late in the Hudson Valley into the Berkshires.  Highs from the mid 70s to mid 80s, warmest north.  Light winds.

heading: Tonight
text: A rising chance of showers or a thunderstorm in southern counties into MA, scattered north to Rt. 4.  Some partial clearing north, becoming partly cloudy through Quebec.  Lows in the 50s to low 60s.  Winds light, becoming southeast up to 10 mph, gusting to 20 in southern NH.

heading: Tuesday
text: Morning showers likely through the southern counties into MA, scattered north to the southern Adirondacks and near Rt. 4.  Clouds breaking for increasing sun farther north. Highs in the 70s south, to near 80 far north.  Winds light, mainly east less than 10 mph.
